title: Cuba confirms talks with Trump, raising possible historic US deal
shortDescription: Cuba's leader signals he's open to signing an economic deal with the Trump administration as the White House cuts off fuel supplies.

title: From the ER to the ballot: Doctors run to challenge RFK Jr.'s agenda
shortDescription: Doctors and scientists are running for office, motivated by concerns over health policy, anti-science movements, and cuts to social programs.

title: Trump, Melania mark Women’s History Month at White House
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump appeared together at a Women's History Month event at the White House on March 12, 2026.

title: Trump reacts to 'terrible' synagogue attack
shortDescription: President Donald Trump sent prayers to the Michigan Jewish community after an attack at a West Bloomfield synagogue.

title: A bill aiming to treat abortion as homicide has failed in Tennessee
shortDescription: Bills that would treat abortion as homicide have been proposed in other states. While they have consistently failed, some are still being considered.

title: How to watch Melania and Donald Trump at women's history event
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump are scheduled to appear together at a Women's History Month event on March 12. Here is how to watch.

title: Did Trump endorse Jake Paul? Yes, but he isn't running for anything yet
shortDescription: President Donald Trump invited Jake Paul on stage at a March 11 event in Hebron, Kentucky. Trump said he would endorse Jake Paul for political office.

title: With bipartisan support, Senate passes big housing reform bill
shortDescription: The Senate passed a marquee bipartisan housing reform bill, sending it to the House of Representatives.

title: TACO shifts from Trump's tariffs to the Iran war. What does it mean?
shortDescription: President Donald Trump was labeled with 'TACO trade' due to his changing tariffs. What does the acronym mean, and why are people using it for Iran?

title: Trump admin begins trade investigations as prelude to impose tariffs
shortDescription: The Trump administration announced it is investigating unfair trade practices in China, Mexico and Europe, as a step toward imposing new tariffs.

title: Trump says Iran war in 'very good shape'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said the U.S. is in "very good shape" as strikes on oil tankers continue in the Middle East.

title: Press secretary defends SAVE America Act
shortDescription: Karoline Leavitt rejected concerns about the SAVE America Act, saying claims it makes voting difficult for married women have "zero validity."

title: Trump's endorsement tested in key elections | The Excerpt
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's political might is being closely scrutinized as politicians weigh the power of his endorsement.

title: Do Democrats have a strategy for winning in midterms?
shortDescription: Democrats prioritize electability over ideology as they regroup from 2024 losses and focus on winning amid shifting voter confidence.

title: Trump endorses Jake Paul but boxer isn't running for office — yet
shortDescription: Trump endorsed boxer Jake Paul for political office even though he isn't campaigning for anything yet.

title: Trump says he would endorse Jake Paul
shortDescription: President Trump said that Jake Paul would have his "complete and total endorsement" if he ever ran for political office.

title: Who's 'the worst person'? Trump trashes maverick Massie on visit to his state
shortDescription: Trump called Rep. Thomas Massie, a Kentucky Republican, a 'disaster' who voted against key initiatives such as tax cuts and the war on Iran.
